marc:datafield.marc:subfield: סונטה לכנור ופסנטר = Sonata, for violin and piano

לדוד מכתם, לנבל ולכלי קשת = L'David michtam, for harp and strings
Translated Title: Epigram of david: for harp and strings
Transliterated title: Li-david mikhtam, le-nevel ul-khele ḳeshet

Printed score for harp and strings (violin(s) 1, violin(s) 2, viola(s), cello(s), bass (ad lib.)).
Work written 1975, revised 1978. Score copyright 1977, printed July 1985.
הרהורים של דראמה, מטמורפוזות לתזמורת קאמרית = Meditations on a drama, metamorphoses for chamber orchestra
Transliterated title: Hirhurim al dra'mah : meṭamorfozot le-tizmoret ḳa'mrit
Variant transliterated title: Hirhurim ʻal drama: meṭamorfozot le-tizmoret ḳamerit
This item is part of a collection that is open for research. Retrieval requires advance notice. Please contact the Cook Music Library to access this item.
Photocopy of manuscript score for chamber orchestra.

: מטמורפוזות על כוראל של באך, לתזמורת סימפונית
Transliterated : Meṭamorfozot al kor'al shel ba'kh, le-tizmoret ṣimfonit
